entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: A fiber crop mentioned in the context of crop area estimation error.

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grain crops mentioned in the context of crop area estimation error.

entities.name: SOUTHERN MALI
entities.description: The region where the methodological study was conducted.

entities.name: DIRECT CROP AREA MEASUREMENT
entities.description: A technique for measuring crop area directly, compared with farmers' estimates.

entities.name: FARMERS' ESTIMATES AFTER VISUAL INSPECTION
entities.description: A technique where farmers estimate crop area based on visual inspection.

entities.name: PHYSICAL MEASUREMENT
entities.description: The process of physically measuring plots to determine area.

entities.name: SURVEY DESIGN
entities.description: The planning of a survey to optimize accuracy, sample size, and cost.

entities.name: OBSERVATIONAL ERROR
entities.description: The difference between the area measured and the area estimated.

entities.name: PLOT SIZE
entities.description: The physical size of the crop plot, which influences observational error.

entities.name: RELATIVE TOTAL ERROR
entities.description: A metric calculated as the square root of the mean square error divided by the mean, used to measure accuracy.

entities.name: COEFFICIENT OF VARIATION
entities.description: A statistical measure of the dispersion of surface variables.

entities.name: RELATIVE BIAS
entities.description: The average observational error divided by the mean area.

entities.name: CROP AREA PER FARM
entities.description: The total area of crops on a single farm.

entities.name: SAMPLE SIZE
entities.description: The number of farmers or farms included in the survey.

entities.name: COST
entities.description: The financial expenditure associated with different measurement techniques.

entities.name: ACCURACY
entities.description: The degree of closeness of an estimate to the actual measured value.

relationships.description: Strongly related with a negative linear relationship
Used to measure crop area per farm
Used to estimate crop area per farm
Calculated as the difference between measured and estimated area
